name: telegram
description: Telegram bot — bidirectional (webhook + AI responses) and one-way (message and media delivery). Sending needs NO chatId — omitted = the configured default chat (TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID); never ask the user for a chat ID unless they want a DIFFERENT recipient. For 24/7 bot notifications, event alerts, server status pushes, and mobile remote control. Setup: get a token from BotFather → obtain a chat ID (@get_id_bot or getUpdates after /start) → save to Vault → activate via the 'Register webhook' button. Commands are processed only for owners on the whitelist (for security).

action.description: send-message=텔레그램 메시지 보내기·전송, 알림 발송, send telegram text message notification / send-photo=사진·이미지 전송, send photo image / send-document=문서·파일 전송, send document file / send-location=위치 전송, send location

text.description: [send-message] Message body (Telegram limit of 4096 characters). Also used as the caption for send-photo / send-document.

parseMode.description: [send-message/send-photo/send-document] Text format. Defaults to plain if omitted. MarkdownV2 requires escaping special characters.

photoUrl.description: [send-photo] Image URL (https://...) or file_id (reuse a previously sent photo).

chatId.description: Recipient chat ID. Falls back to TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID from Vault if omitted. Group chats use negative IDs (e.g., -100123456789).

disableNotification.description: If true, sends a silent push notification.
